acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Reclaim Tax Credits is a trusted Tax Credit Recovery & Consulting provider specializing in restaurant refunds in Ft Lauderdale. We specialize in leveraging federal programs to capture tax credits and maximize FICA tax refunds for the past 3 years to increase profitability for businesses. Call us at 1-213-537-5613.
